chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 397 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 05.09.2023 Since filing of this petition on 12.04.2022 none has appeared to pursue it. Today also no one is present. No intimation is received. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application, if any. Judge Judge ARBROHI
